  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

ABS - L43 Version 1.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 740
Recv ID: 760
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS-VDC - ABS-ESP

        "firstbyte": 7

    "minbytes": 6,

    "sentbytes": "1906000000FF",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData",
    "deny_sds": [],

      },

        "firstbyte": 7

        "firstbyte": 6
      }
